causal_question: What is the causal effect of receiving earlier Progresa coverage on precinct-level turnout in the 2000 presidential election for the subpopulation of precincts whose early-coverage status was shifted by the program's enrollment timing?
vague_question: Does getting earlier access to the Progresa cash-transfer program lead to higher voter turnout in 2000 in those communities that ended up receiving the program earlier?
